query:
SELECT 
  lc.id, 
  lc.customerPhone, 
  lc.stamps, 
  lc.totalStampsEarned, 
  lc.couponsEarned, 
  lc.activeCouponId
FROM loyaltyCards lc
WHERE lc.customerPhone LIKE '%999290000%';
